hooks.command: cd C:/GIT/dev && echo '=== BE[X] SESSION CONTEXT ===' && echo 'Branch:' $(git branch --show-current) && echo 'Last commit:' $(git log --oneline -1) && echo 'Uncommitted:' $(git status --short | wc -l) 'files' && echo '=== PENDING QUESTIONS ===' && (cat ASK.md 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo 'No pending questions') && echo '=== SKILLS: bex-scrum-orchestrator, bex-parallel-development, bex-consistency, bex-mvc-enrichment ===' && echo 'Auto-mode: ON. Commit+push after every feature. Update PROGRESS.md always.'

echo 'COMPACTED — Skills: bex-scrum-orchestrator (auto Scrum), bex-parallel-development (parallel agents), bex-consistency (vocab/brand), bex-mvc-enrichment (View leverages Model). Auto-mode ON. VOCAB: Pioneer/Anchor/Path/Chapter/Venture/Compass/Gate/Route.'
